title: Xtra Yeasty Japanese Chocolate Zenzai
description: A yeasty, molten, quick-fix Japanese dessert featuring dark chocolate chips and toast, made gluten-free-friendly in the form of zenzai.
instructions: In a small bowl, proof the yeast by mixing it with warm water and letting it sit for 5 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Add the yeast mixture to the egg mixture and whisk until smooth.
Melt the chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Butter the gluten-free bread slices on both sides and toast until lightly browned.
To assemble the zenzai, place a toasted bread slice in a bowl, followed by a spoonful of the yeast mixture, and then a spoonful of melted chocolate.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of chocolate on top.
Be careful when eating as the chocolate will be hot and molten.
